# UriContract: urikvm

<!-- generated by `urisys markpact gen-contract` from manifest.yaml; do not edit by hand. -->

```yaml markpact:contract
apiVersion: urisys.io/v1
kind: UriContract
metadata:
  id: urikvm.contract
  version: 1.0.0
scheme: kvm
queries:
- id: kvm.monitor.list
  pattern: kvm://{host}/monitor/query/list
- id: kvm.display.info
  pattern: kvm://{host}/display/query/info
- id: kvm.monitor.screenshot
  pattern: kvm://{host}/monitor/{monitor}/query/screenshot
commands:
- id: kvm.task.click_text
  pattern: kvm://{host}/task/command/click-text
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: kvm.task.type_text
  pattern: kvm://{host}/task/command/type-text
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
```
